name: Ectropy Employee Console
description: A dedicated internal console application for Ectropy staff to manage the entire platform: tenants, users, infrastructure, and monitoring. Architecturally distinct from customer-facing dashboards, consolidating multi-tenant management, cross-tenant user authorization, real-time system health monitoring, and centralized alerting.

before.administration: Scattered across Grafana, direct database access, customer dashboards
before.visibility: No unified view for tenant/user management
before.provisioning: Manual process for each new customer

after.visibility: Real-time system health and tenant metrics at a glance
after.provisioning: Zero-SSH user provisioning via web dashboard

value.operationalVisibility: Single source of truth for platform operations

milestones.name: Console App Structure
milestones.description: React 18 + MUI 6 + React Query 5 app with platform admin authentication gate

milestones.name: Backend Console APIs
milestones.description: 11 RESTful endpoints for tenant CRUD, user authorization, system health

milestones.name: Prometheus/Grafana Hybrid
milestones.description: Embedded Grafana dashboards, native metrics display, real-time WebSocket updates

milestones.name: Alert Management
milestones.description: AlertManager API integration, alert history and acknowledgment, incident tracking

milestones.name: Deployment Management
milestones.description: Watchtower integration, container health monitoring, rollback controls

milestones.name: Analytics & Reporting
milestones.description: Tenant usage analytics, conversion funnel metrics, revenue tracking
